verdict_reasoning: TMED10/p24δ is a type I single-pass TM cargo receptor predominantly resident in ER-Golgi-ERGIC compartments cycling through the secretory pathway. NCBI explicitly notes plasma membrane localization alongside Golgi cisternae, consistent with a minority PM pool from secretory cycling. The small cytoplasmic tail and large GOLD-domain ectodomain face the extracellular side when at the PM. Dominant compartment is endomembrane, but documented PM fraction qualifies as contextual.
